templates.name: Document Operation
templates.description: Read, create, update, or list records from your Frappe database (e.g., Sales Orders, Customers).

templates.name: External API Request
templates.description: Connect to third-party services via HTTP/REST (e.g., Google Search, Stripe, Slack).

templates.name: Platform Utility
templates.description: Built-in capabilities like Speech-to-Text, Canvas operations, or Conversation data management.

templates.name: Run AI Agent
templates.description: Delegate a task to another specialized AI Agent in your system.

templates.name: Custom Script / Function
templates.description: Execute a Python function or custom script for complex logic.

templates.name: Code Interpreter
templates.description: Run code in a sandboxed environment with configurable network access — choose from no network, package-registry presets, or full open access.
